parts.prompt:
Design ONE snake skin part PNG for a 2D puzzle game.
Reference image 1 = style reference image.
Reference image 2 = geometry lock image from template alpha.
Reference image 3 = template original part for expression/feature anchor.
Reference image 4 is user markup overlay (arrows/regions). Follow those edits with high priority.

Part: snake_head.png (Head Default).
Template skin id: classic-burrow.
Expression strictness: both eyes open, neutral slight frown mouth, no tongue, no wink.

This part IS a head. Keep template facial topology and expression class clearly readable.

Hard requirements:
- Keep exact silhouette/contour from reference image 2.
- Keep exact canvas size and center alignment from reference image 2.
- Output with SOLID background color exactly #00ff00 (no checkerboard, no transparency in raw output).
- Keep all useful visual content inside template shape only.
- Keep head/body/tail material and palette coherent as one set.
- Keep facial features large enough to remain readable in tiny gameplay size.
- Do not add white border ring outside shape.
- Do not use transparent outer halo as part of asset.

Hard negatives:
- no shape deformation
- no contour expansion
- no extra outline rings
- no accessories
- no unrelated background objects
